name_cn:
Chanel 24B Shell Bag 🐚
Size: 15*20*6cm, Medium Black Faux Fur
The 24B Spring/Summer new oil-waxed sheepskin shell bag is a dazzling highlight this season. The bag body features shiny sheepskin that is beautifully bright, combining practicality and beauty. It has a unique charm, blending fashion and sophistication. Although it doesn't fit a phone, the capacity is still okay, and there is a card slot inside. The leather chain handle is very comfortable to carry. Ladies who haven't got one yet, hurry up and get it!
Style No. AS5130
